title: The Pendant That Starts It All (1)
overview: Liko arrives at Indigo Academy and meets her partner Pokémon, Sprigatito.

title: The Pendant That Starts It All (2)
overview: Friede, Captain Pikachu and the Rising Volt Tacklers step up to help protect Liko.

title: For Sure! 'Cause Sprigatito's with Me!
overview: Liko, Friede and the other Rising Volt Tacklers set out to rescue Sprigatito.

title: The Treasure After the Storm!
overview: As Liko settles in on the Brave Olivine, the Fuecoco who lives on the ship goes missing!

title: Found You, Fuecoco!
overview: After Roy sneaks onto the Brave Olivine, he and Fuecoco get their chance to shine!

title: The Ancient Poké Ball!
overview: A Rayquaza suddenly emerges from Roy’s Ancient Poké Ball, leaving everyone with questions!

title: Special Training with Cap!
overview: Liko and Roy learn a thing or two about Pokémon battles from Friede and Captain Pikachu!

title: The Door That Never Opens
overview: While the rest of the crew goes shopping, Liko ramps up her efforts to befriend Dot.

title: Welcome to Paldea!
overview: Back in Paldea, the time has come for Liko to part ways with the Rising Volt Tacklers.

title: Nemona and Brassius and...
overview: Liko and Roy arrive in Artazon, but gym leader Brassius is in an artistic slump!

title: Arboliva's Forest
overview: Searching for Arboliva, Liko, Roy and Mollie discover a forest devastated by wildfire.

title: The Future I Choose
overview: After learning the story of the Ancient Adventurer, Liko is faced with a decision.

title: An Unexpected Picnic!
overview: While the Brave Olivine has its computer system rebooted, it’s picnic time for the crew!

title: Fly! Wattrel!!
overview: As Friede tracks suspicious activity, Roy comes up with some special training for Wattrel.

title: Someone We Can't See! Whosawhatsit?!
overview: Liko has gone missing, so Dot calls on a celebrity connection for help!

title: Quaxly, We Can Do It
overview: Officially a trainer, Dot teams up with Quaxly to help take back Liko’s stolen pendant!

title: Special Training Time!
overview: Fuecoco and Wattrel aren't getting along, so Roy sets up some teamwork training!

title: Flying Pikachu, Rising Higher and Higher!
overview: Friede tells the Rising Volt Tacklers the story of how he and Captain Pikachu first met.

title: The Bittersweet Truth
overview: A stop at the Battle Café in Motostoke brings back painful memories for Murdock.

title: Kabu's Battle Training!
overview: Liko, Roy and their Pokémon receive some red-hot training from Gym Leader Kabu!

title: The Lonely Hatenna
overview: After rescuing a wild Hatenna, Liko contemplates her own feelings and makes a new friend!

title: Charge! Galar Mine!
overview: Inside Galar Mine, Liko and the others find a Pokémon that doesn't seem happy to see them!

title: Fiery Galarian Moltres
overview: Faced with an enraged Galarian Moltres, Liko comes up with a different kind of strategy.

title: Reunion at the Ancient Castle!
overview: Finally meeting up with her grandma, Liko learns the identity of the pendant Pokémon.

title: Rivals in the Dark of Night!
overview: Working separately, Amethio and Hamber set out to steal Terapagos from Liko.

title: Terapagos's Adventure!
overview: A curious Liko tries to keep up with Terapagos as it explores the Brave Olivine.

title: As Long As I'm with My Friends
overview: A visit to the Wild Area turns into a curry-making adventure for the Rising Volt Tacklers!

title: The Stolen Treasure
overview: When Roy's Ancient Poké Ball is stolen, the Rising Volt Tacklers track down the thief!

title: Orla and the Poké Ball Smith
overview: When a Poké Ball factory goes on the fritz, Orla steps up to the challenge of fixing it!

title: Slip and Crash! A Mystery Pokémon?!
overview: Strange things are happening aboard the Brave Olivine - could a Pokémon be the cause?

title: Song Within the Mist
overview: Searching for Lapras, the Rising Volt Tacklers investigate an odd white mist over the sea.

title: Lapras's Feelings for Its Friends
overview: Liko comes up with a plan for confronting Lapras of the Six Heroes.

title: Roar of the Black Rayquaza
overview: Amethio challenges the black Rayquaza, and Terapagos displays some of its true power.

title: Respective Departures
overview: As Diana prepares to leave the Brave Olivine, Amethio battles Hamber to become stronger.

title: The Wild Pair, Friede and Cap!
overview: Friede and Captain Pikachu team up to rescue a lost Bramblin from Pokémon hunters.

title: Mission: Find Oinkologne's Partner!
overview: Nidothing, Liko and Roy help a female Oinkologne win the attention of a popular male.

title: Fuecoco... Becomes a Crook?!
overview: Fuecoco does its best to quell a group of angry wild Pokémon with song and dance!

title: The SOS Is from Tandemaus?
overview: Liko, Mollie and their Pokémon set out to save a Tandemaus pair separated by a storm.

title: Tinkatink's Ideal Hammer
overview: Dot befriends a Tinkatink that is determined to make just the right hammer!

title: Farewell, Sprigatito?
overview: Liko's partnership is put to the test after an accident causes Sprigatito to return home.

title: A Wild Mom Appears!
overview: The Rising Volt Tacklers are visited by Dot's mum, and she's here to take Dot home!

title: Transform! Hero of the Seas, Palafin
overview: During a day at the beach, Liko and Roy meet a Pokémon with a superhero secret!

title: A Challenge from the Explorers
overview: While shopping in a seaside town, Liko and Roy receive a strange invitation to battle!

title: The Plan to Capture Rayquaza (1)
overview: The Rising Volt Tacklers uncover a plot by the Explorers to capture the black Rayquaza.

title: From So Far Away (2)
overview: A battle against the black Rayquaza makes Liko realise all she has accomplished so far!

title: Welcome to Naranja Academy!
overview: Liko, Roy and Dot begin their first day of Tera training in the Paldea Region!

title: Put Your Heart into It!
overview: Liko and Floragato try out Terastallisation in a battle against Cortondo Gym leader Katy.

title: Sparkle! The Glow of Flame and Art
overview: Roy's first Tera training test pits him against a familiar face - gym leader Brassius!

title: Dot and Nidothing
overview: Dot struggles to accept Iono’s plan to livestream their upcoming Tera training battle.

title: Trending Terastallisation! Dance, Dance, Quaxly!
overview: Dot creates a plan for her Tera training aptitude test against Iono - but will it work?

title: The Flower Tower
overview: Liko keeps getting distracted by Hatenna and Terapagos, and Floragato isn't happy!

title: Wattrel's High Wind Warning!
overview: When Roy needs help, Wattrel gets a chance to show its trainer just how much it has grown!

title: Hatenna and the Otherworldly
overview: Liko, Roy, and Dot search for an eerie Pokémon known as the Otherworldly.

title: The Treasure of Eternity
overview: Friede visits his former workplace to look for clues about the mystery behind Terapagos.

title: Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four (1)
overview: Liko, Roy and Dot are back at Naranja Academy in time to battle the Elite Four!

title: Liko vs. Rika! Toward the Battle's End (2)
overview: During a match against Rika of the Elite Four, Liko realises what battling is all about.

title: The Terapagos I Don't Know
overview: A visit to Naranja Academy results in answers, and new questions, about Terapagos.

title: Food Fit for a Kingambit!
overview: Dot shines when dysfunction is on the menu for Kingambit and a struggling café!

title: Dance, Quaxly! The Blue Medali Step!
overview: Dot, Quaxly and Tinkatink face gym leader Larry in their latest Tera training test.

title: Roy and Fuecoco's First Snow!
overview: On the way to Montenevera, Liko, Roy and Dot make a pit stop on snowy Glaseado Mountain.

title: Resonating Spirits in a Challenge to Ryme!
overview: Roy and Fuecoco make singing their strategy in a Tera Training usage test against Ryme.

title: A New Song for Fuecoco
overview: In a rematch against Ryme, Roy and Fuecoco take the power of their song to the next level.

title: Ice Battle! Cold-Eyed Grusha
overview: Liko and her Pokémon face gym leader Grusha in battle on top of snowy Glaseado Mountain.

title: The Approaching Shadow!
overview: The explorers cause Liko to become separated from Roy and Dot on Glaseado Mountain.

title: Liko and Amethio
overview: Liko and Amethio are trapped in a freezing cave and must work together to escape.

title: Infiltrating the System! Naranja Academy in Danger!
overview: Liko, Roy and Dot jump into action when the Explorers stage an attack on Naranja Academy.

title: Shine On, Terastallization! Liko vs. Roy!
overview: As Tera training comes to an end, Liko and Roy face off in battle at Naranja Academy.

title: Into a New Sky! The Brave Olivine!
overview: Back on the Brave Olivine, Liko, Roy and Dot receive an unexpected challenge to battle.

title: Roy Is Crocalor, and Crocalor Is Roy!
overview: Roy and Crocalor accidentally switch places while exploring a festival in Kitakami.

title: Tinkatink's Hammer Wasn't Made in a Day
overview: Tinkatink puts up a fight when a wild Bombirdier tries to mess with its beloved hammer.

title: Encounters at the Crystal Pool
overview: Encounters at the Crystal Pool lead to battles, new friends and discoveries about the past.

title: The Search for Kleavor!
overview: Joined by Perrin, the Rising Volt Tacklers set out to find Kleavor on Tengu Mountain.

title: Kleavor the Solitary Warrior
overview: Liko, Roy and Dot finally find Kleavor of the Six Heroes and it wants to battle!

title: The Three Explorers
overview: Diana returns and tells the Rising Volt Tacklers about the true origin of the Explorers.

title: The Wonders of the World!
overview: At the Crystal Pool, Rystal recalls when she, Lucius and Gibeon reached Laqua.

title: Wynaut? Wy-Yes!
overview: The Rising Volt Tacklers meet up with a former member who might know Entei's whereabouts.

title: Ludlow's Homecoming!
overview: A trip to Olivine City gives Ludlow a chance to reminisce about his home town.

title: Entei's Fierce Battle Cry!
overview: The Rising Volt Tacklers work together to battle Entei after finally tracking it down.

title: Over the Top!
overview: Chairwoman Geeta challenges Liko, Roy and Dot to a battle to test their strength.

title: Total-lie Awesome Pokémon in Area Zero?!
overview: A descent into the Great Crater of Paldea reveals wonders and Pokémon beyond imagination.

title: The Pillar of Fire
overview: The Rising Volt Tacklers locate Entei of the Six Heroes, but something seems off.

title: Beyond the Shining Rainbow
overview: The Rising Volt Tacklers finally get a rematch with the Black Rayquaza!

title: The Truth Revealed!
overview: Amethio searches for answers about his grandfather's history and goals.

title: Where the Land Meets the Sky
overview: The Rising Volt Tacklers visit a mountain town on the way to Laqua.

title: The Pokémon Paradise of Laqua!
overview: Following a long journey, the Rising Volt Tacklers finally reach Laqua!

title: The Rising Volt Tacklers vs. the Explorers!
overview: The Rising Volt Tacklers and the Explorers battle over the fate of Laqua.

title: Guided by the Black Rayquaza!
overview: After 100 years, the secrets of Laqua finally come to light.

title: The Earthshaking White Zygarde
overview: Liko and friends show their strength in a battle against Gibeon and the White Zygarde.

title: Where the Adventure Leads
overview: Terapagos uses its power to purify Laqua, but a new threat waits in the shadows.

title: Eyes to the Skies Once Again (1)
overview: Life is back to normal for Roy and friends, until wild Pokémon begin to act strangely...

title: Eyes to the Skies Once Again (2)
overview: After a year apart, Roy visits Liko at Indigo Academy to ask for her help.

title: Following Traces of Laquium
overview: Liko, Roy and Dot investigate a report of Pokémon affected by Laquium.

title: Clash of the Nidothing Fans!
overview: Liko and Meowscarada face off against a fellow Nidothing fan who really loves Litten.

title: The Pokémon Center Lady
overview: Liko and Roy reunite with one of their friends from the Rising Volt Tacklers.

title: The Strong Sphere
overview: Trainers put an intriguing new device into action at an Exceed testing centre.

title: Crash! Team Dragon Rampage!
overview: An encounter with a gang of Dragon Tamers leads Liko and Roy to an unexpected reunion.

title: The Prankster
overview: With Iono's help, Dot confronts a trainer who has been playing pranks with his Stunfisk.

title: Reunion in Cortondo
overview: Liko, Roy and Ult reunite with Dot and Murdock in Cortondo.

title: Orla, Grounded
overview: Memories come flooding back when Orla is asked to build a new airship.

title: We Are the Rising Volt Tacklers!
overview: The Rising Volt Tacklers reunite and prepare to take to the skies once more.

title: Terastallization vs. Mega Evolution!
overview: Now reunited, the Rising Volt Tacklers head to Naranja Academy, where they present their findings, run into old friends and face off in a super showdown!

title: The Knight in the Ruins
overview: Searching for traces of Laquium, Liko and Pagogo encounter a familiar Pokémon.

title: Nidothing Love!
overview: Liko, Roy and Dot team up with Zirc and Onia on an unusual mission!

title: Charcadet's Wish!
overview: Liko, Zirc and Onia find Amethio living on a deserted island.

title: Riding the Waves
overview: Amethio meets Mighty G, and a surfing Gholdengo wows the Rising Volt Tacklers.

title: The Dusk Ball That Wouldn't Open
overview: Ult leaves the Brave Olivine after an argument with Roy.

title: Friends as Two, Me and You
overview: Roy and Ult must work together when they get caught in the Explorers' trap.

title: Taking the Next Steps
overview: Diana arrives with new info about Terapagos and the Six Heroes.

title: Tinkatuff's Hammer Wasn't Made in a Year!
overview: Tinkatuff goes on a quest to find the perfect metal for completing its hammer.

title: The Six Heroes Unleashed!
overview: The Explorers lure in the Rising Volt Tacklers for a battle against former friends.

title: Better, Farther, Stronger!
overview: The Rising Volt Tacklers struggle to keep up against the rampaging Six Heroes.

title: Mega Evolution - Roy
overview: Roy recounts his first meetings with Lucario and Ult in Lumiose City.

title: Mega Evolution - Ult
overview: A tough loss causes Ult to consider what it means to be a Pokémon Trainer.

title: Mega Evolution - Bonds
overview: Roy and Ult return to the Lost Mayo Maze for a rematch with Lucario.

title: Welcome to Blueberry Academy!
overview: The Rising Volt Tacklers meet up with new and old friends at Blueberry Academy.

title: Terarium Training!
overview: Liko, Roy, Dot and Ult begin their training inside the Terarium.

title: Ult-imate Training
overview: Lacey challenges Ult with a special kind of training in the Terarium.

title: Liko and Hattrem, Bonded by Happiness!
overview: Liko worries that Hattrem could be holding itself back for the sake of others.

title: Don't Give Up, Crocalor!
overview: Roy, Crocalor and Kilowattrel take on Drayton in a spirited rematch.

title: Dot and Penny's Top-Secret Mission!
overview: Dot and Penny infiltrate Exceed's server room, but obstacles await.

title: The Catcher in the Sky
overview: As Friede returns from space, his reentry capsule malfunctions.

title: Roy v Friede: Wings of Fire!
overview: Roy and Friede battle to determine the fate of the Rising Volt Tacklers.

title: Mochi Mayhem!
overview: A mysterious force causes the Rising Volt Tacklers to begin dancing mindlessly.

title: Storming Explorers Headquarters!
overview: Having realized that the Six Heroes are being held captive at Explorers Headquarters, Liko and the others launch a rescue operation together with Amethio. The operation is proceeding smoothly as they make their way into the headquarters, but they then suddenly find Rubella and Indi standing in their way! Liko's Carbou and Amethio's Soublades take them on; Will they be able to overcome this challenge by working together?!

title: Get the Six Heroes Back!
overview: Liko and the others had finally reached the Six Heroes... however, they end up separated due to Spinel's schemes and now have to face the Six Heroes in one-on-one battles as the Super Strong Spheres make them run wild?! Despite the deep trouble they now find themselves in, they fight their opponents with the power they've gained during their training! Everything to get back the Six Heroes!!

title: A Battle You Can't Afford to Lose! The Bond That's Put to the Test!!
overview: Liko and the others visit Orange Academy in order to prevent the Strong Spheres from getting rolled out. However, while they manage to ban their usage at the academy thanks to Principal Clavel stepping in, their fellow former Terastal trainee Bok remains unconvinced and challenges Liko to a battle. If she loses, the ban will be lifted?!

title: Hyper Training! Everyone's Respective Feelings!
overview: Liko and the others resolve to get even stronger for the sake of eradicating the Rakulium. And not only does Nemo and the others end up helping them with their battle training, so does Hassaku from the Paldea Elite Four.

title: Step by Step! Dot and Welkamo!!
overview: Dot has decided to leave the position as one of the 18 Teras Type Trainers in favor of a support role, but Welkamo is still doing battle training with all its might without her. When Nanjamo sees this, she points out to Dot that she and her Pokémon are no longer on the same page and challenges her to a battle! During this battle, Dot ends up being completely overwhelmed by Nanjamo and Harabarie, but when she sees Welkamo's refusal to give up...?

title: The Time Has Come for the Showdown with the Black Rayquaza
overview: Roy and the others visit the Dragon Shrine to meet with the Black Rayquaza. After Roy manages to get through to it, Pagogo helps it Dragon Terastallize! A battle for the purpose of testing Roy and Uruto's strength then begins; And this time, it's for the sake of becoming its true Partner... The Time Has Come for the Showdown with the Black Rayquaza?!

title: Hambel on the Night of the Blood Moon
overview: The Strong Spheres have finally been released and are now in use all over the world... And Liko and the others are more determined than ever to get rid of the Rakulium this time around. Meanwhile, Sango, Onyx and Agate head towards Rakua to guard it against intruders when someone appears before them... Hamber! A fierce battle begins between Hamber the teacher and the three students he once taught?!

title: The Time Has Come! Gather, Companions!
overview: Friede goes to Hakko City in order to meet up with the Rising Volt Tacklers. However, he gets followed by someone kind of suspicious... Meanwhile, Nemo, Botan, Anne and other members of the 18 Teras Type Trainers show up at Liko and the others' as they prepare to head to Rakua! And a certain couple other people show up as well...?!

title: Grudge Match! Lucario's Challenge!!
overview: Roy and Lucario were unable to master the new Mega Evolution. But while Lucario is getting impatient, Roy suggests that it relaxes a bit instead...?! The two then end up battling Master Mayonnaise's Luchabull again.... and during this battle, they manage to discover a new way to use Wave Guidance. After that, they acquire the new Mega Evolution as well?!

title: Towards the Final Fight
overview: The operation meant to fully eradicate the Rakulium finally begins! The group splits into two and heads towards the central parts of Rakua, but as Liko and the others make their way through the forest, Rubella and Indi appear before them and send out Desukarn and Deathbarn that have been strengthened with Strong Spheres! Dot, Nemo and Botan stay behind to battle, letting Liko continue onward on her own, but...?!

title: The Ultimate Showdown! Mega Evolution!!
overview: Roy, Uruto and Friede duel against Sango, Onyx and Agate! But during this fierce see-saw battle of Mega Evolved Pokémon, Roy and the others spot the key to victory! What is it?! Meanwhile, Liko and the others meet up with Amethio before finally reaching the central parts of Rakua... where they spot...?!

title: Awakening! The Catastrophic Rakurium Core
overview: Pagogo turns into its Stellar Forme and sends its power to the 18 Pokémon, which Terastallize one after another. Meanwhile, the Explorers go all out to prevent the Rakulium from getting eradicated! Liko and the others find themselves driven up against the wall, but still fight on, refusing to give up. And then Spinel takes a "certain action" that awakens the Rakulium Core itself...?!

title: Stellar Finale
overview: Having absorbed Spinel, the awakened Rakulium Core goes on a rampage! An all-out fierce battle breaks out, with even the Explorers providing Liko and the others with backup, but in the end they only have one single chance to destroy the core by using the most powerful attack they can pull off...?! Just then, Rayquaza and Zygarde respond to Roy and Amethio by...?! And Liko's final resolve is to...?! The time has finally come for the long fight over Rakua to conclude!!

title: Reboot! Off to the World of Adventure!!
